name: Gaurav Lahoti
title: Cloud & AI-Native Architect
tagline: Spent a decade making enterprise systems talk to each other. Now I wire AI into that fabric, making it reason, adapt, and act. Curiosity drives the exploration; 10+ years of enterprise delivery keeps it grounded.
bio: 11+ years engineering leadership in distributed systems and cloud-native architecture (GCP / AWS).
Building production-grade AI with LangGraph, Google ADK, and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Transforms middleware patterns into self-governing operations with deterministic LLM execution.

Which cloud certifications does he hold?
What kinds of problems does he solve for clients?

agentExplainer.title: Meet the agent
body: It's built on Google's **Agent Development Kit**, powered by the Gemini model, and lives on **Cloud Run**. When it needs to actually do something, like email you my resume, it reaches through a Resend **MCP** server, with **Model Context Protocol** handling the wiring between the agent and its tools. The first reply might lag a moment while it warms up. That's just the cold start.

**Grounded**, not guessing. Every response draws from a versioned snapshot of my profile, projects, certifications, and recent writing, rebuilt fresh on every deploy. Each turn, it decides what to cite, what you might want to ask next, and when the right move is to send you straight to me. Watch the follow-up chips and the inline [1] markers. They show what it's confident about and exactly where it's pulling from.
It knows where it ends. It won't quote a salary, book my calendar, or invent opinions I've never voiced. Step outside that fence and it'll point you to the real me.

nudge.label: Want a TL;DR of his career arc?
nudge.prompt: Give me a TL;DR of his career arc

agentIntro.text: Powered by ADK and Gemini, grounded in Gaurav's projects, certifications and writing. Ask me anything about his work. I can also email you his resume or drop him a note.
